ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon_species" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "evolution_stage" INTEGER /* Evolution stage of the Pokémon */,
  "normal_type" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "secondary_type" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon (if any) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "ability" TEXT /* Ability of the Pokémon */,
  "base_hp" INTEGER /* Base hit points of the Pokémon */,
  "base_attack" INTEGER /* Base attack power of the Pokémon */,
  "base_defense" INTEGER /* Base defense power of the Pokémon */,
  "base_speed" INTEGER /* Base speed of the Pokémon */,
  "base_special_attack" INTEGER /* Base special attack power of the Pokémon */,
  "base_special_defense" INTEGER /* Base special defense power of the Pokémon */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the Pokémon */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Shape of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Habitat where the Pokémon is commonly found */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  "is_ultra_beast" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon is an Ultra Beast */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Gender ratio of the Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Capture rate of the Pokémon */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points gained for capturing or defeating the Pokémon */,
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* Growth rate of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_ability FOREIGN KEY ("ability") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_evolution_stage FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_stage") REFERENCES evolution_stages ("evolution_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_normal_type FOREIGN KEY ("normal_type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_secondary_type FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_growth_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("growth_rate_id") REFERENCES growth_rates ("growth_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_stages" (
  "evolution_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evolution stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type effectiveness table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_effectiveness_id FOREIGN KEY ("effectiveness_id") REFERENCES type_effectiveness ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the ability */,
  "hidden_ability" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ability is a hidden ability */,
  "flavor_text" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ability's effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership instance */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon owned */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the Pokémon */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player who owns the Pokémon */,
  "captured_date" TEXT /* Date the Pokémon was captured by the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the Pokémon */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname given to the Pokémon by the player */,
  "current_hp" INTEGER /* Current HP of the Pokémon */,
  "status_condition" TEXT /* Current status condition of the Pokémon */,
  "nature_id" INTEGER /* Nature of the Pokémon */,
  "iv_hp" INTEGER /* Individual value for HP */,
  "iv_attack" INTEGER /* Individual value for attack */,
  "iv_defense" INTEGER /* Individual value for defense */,
  "iv_speed" INTEGER /* Individual value for speed */,
  "iv_special_attack" INTEGER /* Individual value for special attack */,
  "iv_special_defense" INTEGER /* Individual value for special defense */,
  "ev_hp" INTEGER /* Effort value for HP */,
  "ev_attack" INTEGER /* Effort value for attack */,
  "ev_defense" INTEGER /* Effort value for defense */,
  "ev_speed" INTEGER /* Effort value for speed */,
  "ev_special_attack" INTEGER /* Effort value for special attack */,
  "ev_special_defense" INTEGER /* Effort value for special defense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_owners_nature_id FOREIGN KEY ("nature_id") REFERENCES natures ("nature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_owners_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_owners_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that participated in the battle */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent Pokémon */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (win/loss) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the battle took place */,
  "battle_type" TEXT /* Type of battle (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition during the battle */,
  "terrain_condition" TEXT /* Terrain condition during the battle */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the battle */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who participated in the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_battles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_battles_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_battles_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the generation was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate */,
  "growth_rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the player last logged in */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles the player has participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of battles the player has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_effectiveness" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type */,
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the target type */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against the target type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "target_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "natures" (
  "nature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nature */,
  "nature_name" TEXT /* Name of the nature */,
  "increased_stat" TEXT /* The stat that is increased by the nature */,
  "decreased_stat" TEXT /* The stat that is decreased by the nature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nature_id")
)
